conventions.tickerLines: 5-char tickers: last char O=ARS, D=USD MEP, C=USD cable; base = first 4 chars
conventions.cashflows: remainingCashflows are per 100 VN of ORIGINAL face from 2026-06-10 (exclusive), at scheduled dates; weekend/holiday rolls noted per instrument, accrual unadjusted unless stated
conventions.dayCounts: IRCP 30/360 (explicit); YM39 actual/365 (explicit); OZC3 actual/365 (explicit); PLC4 and TSC4 30/360 assumed (NY-law standard, unverified)

instruments.name: IRSA ON Clase XXIV 8.00% 2035 (USD, Ley NY)

issuer.legalName: IRSA Inversiones y Representaciones Sociedad Anónima

currency.note: Payments in USD outside Argentina via DTC/BoNY (principal paying agent The Bank of New York Mellon); local paying agent Banco Santander Argentina. Aviso de suscripción: 'denominadas y pagaderas en Dólares Estadounidenses'.

instruments.amountNotes: USD 300,000,000 original (incl. concurrent Clase XIV exchange, issued 2025-03-31) + USD 180,000,000 adicionales (reapertura, issued 2025-12-17, priced 98.503%); BYMA ficha montoResidual 480,454,198.

coupon.paymentPattern: March 31 and September 30 each year, in arrears; first coupon 2025-09-30; last on maturity 2035-03-31
coupon.dayCount: 30/360 (explicit in aviso de suscripción: 'doce meses, de 30 días, sobre un año de 360 días')
coupon.businessDayRule: Following, unadjusted accrual (payment moves to next BA/NY business day, no extra interest)

amortization.note: NOT bullet. 3 annual installments 33/33/34 at years 8/9/10 (aviso de suscripción + BYMA ficha 'En tres pagos anuales' + cbonds). bonistas API 'bullet' label is WRONG.

minDenomination.note: Denominaciones mínimas USD 1 y múltiplos de USD 1 (aviso de suscripción); BYMA ficha denominacionMinima=1; Cohen lámina mínima 1.

instruments.cashflowNotes: Per 100 VN original face, scheduled dates from 2026-06-10. Coupons: 8%x180/360 on outstanding face (4.00 while 100 outstanding; 2.68 on 67 residual after 2033-03-31; 1.36 on 34 residual after 2034-03-31). Sat/Sun scheduled dates (2028-09-30, 2029-03-31, 2029-09-30, 2030-03-31, 2034-09-30, 2035-03-31) pay next business day without extra accrual.
flags: bonistas marks IRCPO amortization 'bullet' — wrong; primary docs and BYMA ficha confirm 33/33/34 in 2033/2034/2035.

Press articles on the Dec-2025 reapertura (abogados.com.ar) say 'vencimiento el 31 de diciembre de 2035' — wrong; adicionales are fungible with Clase XXIV, maturity 2035-03-31 (BYMA ficha, cbonds, bonistas, aviso de suscripción).
ISIN on BYMA line is the RegS USP58809BU07; 144A line US450047AJ43 trades offshore.

checkedSources: https://www.iamc.com.ar/Informe/InformeDiarioDeudaCorporativa09062026/ (IAMC Deuda Corporativa 09-06-2026, panel LEY NY: IRCPO Tasa Fija 8.0%, Semestral, prox cupon 30-Sep-26, vto 31-Mar-35, Cuotas Capital 3 Anual desde 31-Mar-33, Monto 480M, VT 101.6, YTM 7.43%)
https://bonistas.com/api/bonds (re-fetched 2026-06-10: IRCPD 24hs last 109.35 tir 6.9270%; still labels amortization bullet - known wrong, see flags)
https://data912.com/live/arg_corp (order book 2026-06-10: odd-lot quantities 3409/4421 VN on IRCPD corroborate 1 VN minimum lot)

goldenCheck.publishedSource: bonistas.com /api/bonds IRCPD 24hs 2026-06-10 (tir 6.9270%, MEP basis, same D-line price 109.35)
goldenCheck.crossCheck: IAMC YTM 7.43% is on the cable/CCL basis (LEY NY panel converts ARS cierre 159890 at FX~1513): spec cashflows at IRCPC cable price 106.90 give 7.22% (delta -0.21pp, pass). bonistas tir assumes bullet; the 33/33/34 amortizer at the same price gives 6.81% (-0.12pp) - structure difference, not a spec error.

instruments.name: YPF ON Clase XXXIX 8.75% 2030 (USD cable, Ley AR)

currency.note: Suscriptas y pagaderas en USD 'en el exterior' (hard-dollar cable mechanics); if FX access restricted, issuer must deliver USD via sale of USD-denominated public securities (suplemento). Coupons and principal both USD.

instruments.amountNotes: US$167,236,644 original (2025-07-22) + US$57,565,044 Clase XXXIX Adicionales (2025-08-28, fungible) = 224,801,688 (matches BYMA ficha montoResidual).

coupon.paymentPattern: January 22 and July 22 each year, in arrears; first coupon 2026-01-22; last on maturity 2030-07-22 (dates listed in aviso de resultados)
coupon.dayCount: actual/365 (explicit in suplemento: 'cantidad real de días transcurridos sobre la base de un año de 365 días')
coupon.businessDayRule: Modified following (next business day unless different month/after maturity, then preceding), per suplemento

amortization.note: Única cuota at maturity (aviso de resultados item 8; BYMA ficha 'En una cuota al vencimiento').

minDenomination.note: Unidad mínima de negociación y denominación mínima V/N US$1; monto mínimo de suscripción primaria US$100 (suplemento). BYMA ficha denominacionMinima=1.

instruments.cashflowNotes: Per 100 VN, actual/365: 8.75 x days/365 x 100. Periods: 181d (Jan22->Jul22) = 4.339041; 184d (Jul22->Jan22) = 4.410959; 182d for 2028-01-22->2028-07-22 (leap Feb) = 4.363014. 2028-01-22, 2028-07-22 are Saturdays, 2029-07-22 Sunday: pay next business day per modified-following, accrual unadjusted to scheduled date.
sources: https://investors.ypf.com/documents/emisiones/locales/YPF%20-%20Aviso%20de%20Resultados%20ONs%20Clase%20XXXIX.pdf (primary: aviso de resultados 2025-07-17; rate, dates, bullet, ISIN)

https://inversores.ypf.com/documents/emisiones/locales/YPF%20-%20Clase%20XXXIX%20(cable)%20Suplemento.pdf (primary: suplemento de prospecto 2025-07-15; day count actual/365, denominations, ley AR, business-day rule)
flags: Day count is actual/365, NOT 30/360 — coupons are unequal (4.339041/4.410959/4.363014 per 100), do not hardcode 4.375.
Inventory note said 'U$S CG' from IOL title — it denotes 'con garantía común' / cable settlement; payment currency is USD abroad (cable), MEP/ARS lines arbitraged on BYMA.

IAMC Informe Diario Deuda Corporativa lists YM39O in the 'LEY NY' panel and Monto Emitido 58M - both misleading: law is AR (ISIN AR0081455617, suplemento) and 58M is only the adicionales tranche (total residual 224.8M). IAMC panel placement drives its FX basis (cable), not the bond's law.

https://www.cohen.com.ar/Bursatil/Especie/YM39D (re-fetched 2026-06-10: ISIN AR0081455617, vto 22/7/2030, lamina minima USD 1.00)
https://data912.com/live/arg_corp (order book 2026-06-10: odd-lot quantities 91 VN on YM39O / 70 VN on YM39C corroborate 1 VN minimum lot)

goldenCheck.computedBasisNote: 7.07% computed at YM39C cable price 109.70 to match IAMC's basis; at the YM39D MEP price 113.30 the same cashflows give 6.07%.
goldenCheck.publishedSource: IAMC Informe Diario Deuda Corporativa 09-06-2026 (YTM 7.15%, cable/CCL basis: LEY NY panel converts ARS cierre 165560 at FX~1513 -> USD 109.4 ~ YM39C)
goldenCheck.failureInvestigation: Initial D-line comparison failed (6.07 vs 7.15, -1.08pp). Traced to PRICE BASIS, not spec: IAMC's 'DEUDA CORPORATIVA EN USD - LEY NY' panel prices at cable dollar (~1513) while the D line is MEP (~1455); canje ~4 pct explains the whole gap. Cable-line computation matches IAMC within 0.08pp; amortization/coupon/day-count confirmed correct.

isinNotes.regS: USP7924AAA62 (BYMA line per BYMA ficha and Cohen)

currency.note: Denominadas y pagaderas en USD; international 144A/RegS with local tranche; trustee/paying agent Citibank N.A.

coupon.dayCount: actual/365 (explicit in aviso de suscripción: 'cantidad real de días transcurridos y un año de 365 días')

amortization.note: Único pago at maturity (aviso de resultados item 8; BYMA ficha 'AL VENCIMEINTO' sic).

https://www.bancoprovincia.com.ar/CDN/Get/EDEMSA_CLASE_3_ADICIONAL_Y_CLASE_5_Y_6_Aviso_de_Resultado (primary: aviso de resultados 2025-05-08; 8.00%, coupon dates, bullet 2027-11-29, ISIN AR0428738048, Código A3 OZC3O, CVSA 58271)

https://www.bancoprovincia.com.ar/CDN/Get/ON_EDEMSA_Clase_3_adic_y_7_Suplemento_de_prospecto (primary: suplemento Dec-2025 reapertura; restates 8.00%, vto 2027-11-29, remaining coupon dates, V/N US$28,420,903 pre-reopening)
flags: BYMA ficha shows interes 'FIJO 7%' — WRONG/stale: two issuer-signed primary documents (aviso de resultados May-2025 and suplemento Dec-2025) state tasa fija 8,00% nominal anual. Use 8.00%.

https://www.invertironline.com/posts/obligaciones-negociables-recomendadas-suscripcion-edemsa-07-05-2025 (IOL: Clase 3 hard dollar 8.0% fija, vto Nov-2027, semestral, bullet, suscripcion minima US$100 y luego multiplos de US$1)
https://data912.com/live/arg_corp (order book 2026-06-10: odd-lot quantities 150/800 VN on OZC3O corroborate 1 VN minimum lot; no OZC3C line quoted, consistent with tickers.cable=null)

goldenCheck.publishedSource: IAMC Informe Diario Deuda Corporativa 09-06-2026 (YTM 7.70%, MEP basis: LEY ARG panel, ARS cierre 147180 at FX~1460 -> USD 100.8)
goldenCheck.crossCheck: Delta is one day of market move: IAMC priced off 2026-06-09 close (USD ~100.80) vs D-line 100.50 on 2026-06-10; same cashflows at 100.80 give ~7.77%.

notes: BYMA open-data ficha técnica (open.bymadata.com.ar vanoms-be-core free endpoint) used as exchange-level source for amortization/ISIN/min denomination/outstanding for all five; cross-checked against issuer primary docs where available.

Key error-source findings this batch: (1) IRCP is an amortizer (33/33/34 2033-35) though bonistas labels it bullet; (2) PLC4 marketed as 3-installment amortizer in the aviso de suscripción but final terms are bullet 2032-05-30; (3) OZC3 BYMA ficha coupon 7% is wrong (8.00%); (4) YM39 and OZC3 accrue actual/365, not 30/360; (5) PLC4/TSC4 trade in 1,000 VN minimum lots on BYMA, IRCP/YM39/OZC3 in 1 VN.

Adversarial verification pass 2026-06-10/11: all five instruments re-derived against the IAMC/BYMA Informe Diario de Deuda Corporativa 09-06-2026 (source not previously used) - coupon, maturity, amortization (cuotas/frecuencia/proximo pago capital) and next-coupon dates all match; no corrections required. minDenomination corroborated empirically via data912 order-book lot sizes (PLC4/TSC4 quote in exact 1,000 VN multiples; IRCP/YM39/OZC3 show odd lots) plus IOL suscripcion post for OZC3. Golden TIR: D-line dirty prices (data912 2026-06-10), settlement 2026-06-11, effective-annual act/365 IRR vs published TIRs (bonistas for IRCP, IAMC for the rest). KEY BASIS FINDING: IAMC's ON report prices its 'LEY NY' panel at the cable/CCL dollar (~1513 on 09-06) and its 'LEY ARG' panel at MEP (~1460); D-line comparisons for cable-panel bonds (YM39, TSC4, IRCP) must use the C line or accept a ~0.5-1.1pp canje wedge.
